case_title: SHAHRAM ZOMORRODI VS. JOSE LUIS CARDENAS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $145) SERVED OCT-27-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARDENAS, JOSE LUIS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-27-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHAHRAM ZOMORRODI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE LUIS CARDENA IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMS THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 10-27-22 IS NOT VALID SERVICE. THE SUBSTITUTE SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ZOMORRODI, SHAHRAM AS TO DEFENDANT CARDENAS, JOSE LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
